title: Sync with your tracker.
subtitle: Connect AniList so ani-gui knows what you're watching. Your watchlist + scores stay in sync without you opening a second app.
privacy_consent_line: By connecting, you agree to ani-gui's
connect_error_port_busy: Port 53682 is in use. Close the other app holding it and try again.
connect_error_timeout: Sign-in took too long. Try again.
connect_error_oauth_error: The provider declined the sign-in. Try again.
connect_error_no_bridge: The ani-gui preload bridge is missing. Restart the app.
persist_error_keychain_unavailable: Sign-in succeeded but the OS keychain isn't available — your token can't be stored securely. Install (or unlock) gnome-keyring / kwallet / KeePassXC and try again.
disconnect_confirm_body: Your watchlist stays on {provider} — only the local connection is dropped.
watch_later_empty_hint: Добавили тайтл в трекере? Обновите, чтобы подтянуть его.
disconnect_error_token_clear: Couldn't clear the local token. Try again or check ani-gui logs.
expiry_toast_message: Срок сеанса {provider} истёк. Войдите снова, чтобы продолжить синхронизацию.
primary_hint: Отображается в верхней панели и возглавляет полку «Посмотреть позже». Прогресс по-прежнему синхронизируется со всеми подключёнными трекерами.
primary_save_error: Не удалось сохранить основной трекер. Попробуйте ещё раз.
